name: Rudraksh Sharma

projects.description: Analyzed customer churn patterns to identify high-risk users and business impact. Designed a data-driven workflow to support retention strategies and targeted interventions. Built a dashboard to visualise churn trends and support decision-making. Explored how predictive insights can be integrated into automated outreach systems.
projects.name: Customer Churn Analysis & Retention Workflow (AI-assisted)

projects.description: Identified inefficiencies in clinic booking workflows where delayed confirmations caused patient drop-offs. Designed an automated system for appointment booking, instant responses, and structured follow-ups. Integrated AI (Llama 3) to convert medical shorthand into structured clinical notes. Automated scheduling and reminders using Google Calendar API, reducing no-shows. Built end-to-end system connecting patient interaction, scheduling, and doctor workflow.
projects.name: CareDost – AI-Powered Clinic Workflow Automation System
